action: Search and gather 10 news articles about Tamil Nadu every hour from reliable news sources.

recipe.steps: Set up a scheduled job to run every hour for news gathering about Tamil Nadu.
Perform a Google Search with the query 'Tamil Nadu latest news', filter the results to include only 10 articles from reliable news sources.
Save the gathered news articles under a logically constructed key so they can be retrieved for future aggregation or publishing.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Search and gather 10 latest reliable news articles about Tamil Nadu and save them for future aggregation.
